metadata.description: Personal plugin marketplace by Pete Capra

plugins.name: board-paper-writer
plugins.description: Draft governance-grade board papers through collaborative Q&A and iterative refinement. Covers decision, discussion, noting, and assurance papers — structured around AICD, GGI, and Board Intelligence QDI best practices.

plugins.name: business-name-checker
plugins.description: Generate Australian business name ideas and check availability across ASIC, domains, Etsy, and Instagram. Each check is optional — you choose what to search.
